creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Good evening,

I've just heard from the old maintainer for news/sabnzbd that the quarterly packages are broken due to a dependency mismatch.

Currently in 14/13 quarterly sabnzbd 4.2.2 and sabctools 8.2.3 are listed. sabnzbd 4.2.2 required sabctools 8.1.0.

He's recommended I ask for a merge of the latest of each into the quarterly branches. These would be sabnzbd:4.3.3 and sabctools:8.2.5

Please let me know if I've requested this correctly and provided sufficient/appropriate information as this is my first such request.

Thanks,
Nick
